intro: Angelica sinensis tea, also known as dong quai, is a traditional Chinese herbal remedy that has been used for centuries to promote women's health and well-being. Made from the dried root of the Angelica sinensis plant, this tea is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help to alleviate menstrual cramps, reduce stress, and improve overall vitality. Regular consumption of angelica sinensis tea is believed to promote a healthy balance of hormones and support the body's natural healing processes.
